programme.desc: Lucy debe luchar para impedir que su amor de la infancia tire abajo una hacienda para construir un campo de golf. Mientras buscan un punto medio, descubren que el pasado podría ser la clave para proteger el futuro.

programme.title: Una Navidad de cuento
programme.desc: Una princesa quiere comprobar cómo vive la gente normal y se hace pasar por una persona anónima durante unos días. Así, se enamora de un hombre generoso que vive para ayudar a los demás y quien no conoce su identidad. ¿La aceptará y la amará pese a su privilegiado origen?.

programme.title: Señorita Navidad
programme.desc: Con la tarea de encontrar el árbol de Navidad perfecto para la ceremonia de encendido de luces del árbol navideño en Washington, D.C., una mujer viaja a un pintoresco pueblo de Nueva Inglaterra después de recibir la carta de un niño pequeño.

programme.title: El velo de novia: La revelación
programme.desc: Emma viaja a Italia para investigar un velo de novia que se dice que trae amor a su dueña. Mientras está allí, conoce a Paolo, el hijo de una familia que hace encajes.

programme.title: Una escapada invernal
programme.desc: Un hombre tiene un romance con un conserje luego de confundirlo con un millonario durante un viaje único.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Ezekiel y Negan organizan una revuelta clandestina contra los guardianes. Aaron, Jerry, Lydia y Elijah se unen a Luke y a Jules durante su huida a la costa. Además, Eugene es juzgado con el apoyo de Yumiko como abogada defensora.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los alejandrinos y los prisioneros vuelven a la Commonwealth para enfrentarse a Pamela Milton. Por otro lado, una horda se acerca a la ciudad.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Carol llevan a Judith al hospital, mientras que Rosita, Eugene y Gabriel buscan a Coco. Por otro lado, Maggie y Negan se enfrentan a Pamela y los héroes se reúnen para una última batalla.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie busca a Negan para que la ayude a salvar a su hijo, al que ha secuestrado un sádico superviviente, al que llaman el Croata, que vive en Manhattan. Negan accede a acompañarla a cambio de que permita a Ginny integrarse en su comunidad.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Una anciana ayuda a Maggie y Negan a escapar de los zombis y los conduce hasta su tribu, a la cual los soldados del Croata tratan de exterminar. Negan revela que conoce al Croata: trabajó a sus órdenes hasta que lo expulsó por ser demasiado sádico.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.sub-title: Dead City: Las personas son un recurso
programme.desc: La tribu les explica a Maggie y Negan el modus operandi de los Burazi, el cual ellos reconocen idéntico al que usaban antes los Salvadores, por lo que saben cómo atacarlos. Luther descubre que se ofrece una recompensa por Negan y lo ataca.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.sub-title: Dead City: Todos reciben un premio
programme.desc: Maggie y Negan llevan a cabo un ataque, pero no todo sale de acuerdo al plan. Ginny y Armstrog tienen inesperados contactos con otros.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.sub-title: Dead City: Historias que nos contamos a nosotros mismos
programme.desc: Negan y Perlie se realizan confesiones mutuas mientras se abren paso por Manhattan. Maggie llega a la conclusión de que Tommaso traicionó a la tribu y provocó el ataque en el Madison Square Garden. Tommaso admite que llegó a un acuerdo con el Croata.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.sub-title: Sara le confiesa todo a Salvador

programme.title: El Barón
programme.desc: Nacho y sus secuaces huyen por el bosque. Por la condición de Isabel tratan de conseguir la ayuda del padre Miguel. La Policía Nacional hace explotar el laboratorio.

programme.title: El Barón
programme.desc: Nacho propone abandonar Colombia e ir a Panamá a ocultarse de los estadounidenses, pero alguien debe hacerse cargo del negocio. Escobar decide que sea el Barón.

programme.title: El Barón
programme.desc: Santacruz negocia con Nacho: le propone pagar 20 millones de dólares a cambio de sacar del camino al cártel de Medellín. Cecilia soborna a un sargento. Escobar y sus secuaces disfrutan en Panamá.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos: Trampa
programme.desc: Mónica vuelve a casa y se encuentra con noticias impactantes. Tras una llamada de su hija Rutila, Aurelio recorre Los Ángeles en busca del Turco y su familia.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Amada es enferma terminal y solicita orden de alejamiento de su esposo, pero él se opone a dejarla. Verónica y Gerard buscan a un tercero para tener mejor sexo, pero todo se transforma en tragedia.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Jean sospecha que su cuñado, un pandillero activo, se comió a su sobrino. Peter, un agente carcelario, fue acusado de violación, se enteró de que es padre y su víctima cobró 500 mil dólares.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: Mi golpiza en evidencia Sexo en el aire
programme.desc: Carolina presenta fotos de las palizas de su marido, pero él le exige una disculpa pública. Kattia es profesora y fue despedida por tener sexo con un alumno de 15 años, pero ella dice que es legal.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Priscila fue abandonada por su esposo al dudar de su paternidad. Ahora ella exige la custodia de su hijo menor. Además, un joven abandonó a sus papás por hacer porno y los custodios exigen manutención.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: Jalando la puerca Seducido por el sida

programme.title: Caso cerrado

programme.desc: Teo comienza su iniciación con la Logia. Valeria le confiesa a Mía muchas cosas malas sobre su madre. Gracias a las mentiras de Joaquín, Pilar regresa con él. Nico se enoja con Lupita por hablar con Abraham.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Esteban sorprende a los alumnos viendo una película porno Pilar amenaza a Vico Julieta termina con Miguel porque sabe que está enamorado de Mia Teo y Miguel se agarran a golpes Franco se enoja con Valeria por contarle a Mia sobre su mamá.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Lupita le cuenta a Mía que Teo se metió en la Logia para ayudar a Miguel. Luego, Mía impide que Vico se drogue. Mientras tanto, José le hace creer a Teo que Roberta está enamorada de él.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mía acusa a Miguel con Esteban por espiarla en el baño de mujeres. Por su parte, Madariaga le dice a Vico que se quiera a sí misma. Además, Mía y Celina se reconcilian con Vico.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Esteban le dice a Mía que cuando quiera una relación seria y sentir amor, él la estará esperando. Por su parte, un hombre golpea a Tomás por ir a visitar a Lulú.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mía le dice a Alma que su papá ha cambiado mucho desde que anda con Valeria. Por su parte, Pascual le dice a Madariaga que tendrá que irse del colegio. Además, Vico planea demostrar que Joaquín es el que vende la droga.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: León le recuerda a Paula que solo le hizo un favor y le prohíbe acercarse otra vez a Diego. Por su parte, Tomás le pide disculpas a Cata por invitarla a salir y dejarla plantada. Mientras tanto, Diego piensa decir la verdad para que no corran a Madariaga.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Alma se entera por qué la mamá de Mía la abandonó. Mientras tanto, Joaquín sufre un ataque por drogarse y luego hacer ejercicio. Por su parte, Roberta arruina la cena con los amigos de su papá.

programme.title: Destilando amor
programme.desc: Bárbara le pide a Pamela dejar su venganza y olvidarse de Aarón, pero ella se niega. La familia Montalvo se prepara para la lectura del testamento de Amador.

programme.title: Destilando amor
programme.desc: La familia Montalvo se sorprende al enterarse de que Amador solicita la presencia de Clara o Gaviota en la lectura de una de sus cartas. Sofía le dice a Daniela que investigó a Isadora y le asegura que confesará todo lo que sabe sobre ella.

programme.title: Amores verdaderos
programme.desc: Victoria y Arriaga consuman su amor. Nelson va en busca de ellos y no puede creer lo que encuentra. Guzmán y Nikki se confiesan su amor.

programme.title: Amores verdaderos
programme.desc: Adriana siente que se está enamorando de Carlos. Por su parte, Kendra manda a Espanto matar a Nabila mientras Victoria se compromete a amar a Arriaga por el resto de su vida.

programme.title: Amores verdaderos
programme.desc: Victoria le confiesa a Nikki su amor por Arriaga. Nelson le cuenta a Aníbal que Victoria tiene una relación con José Ángel.

programme.title: Amores verdaderos
programme.desc: Anibal cuestiona a Victoria su relación con Arriaga. El parto de Kendra se adelantó pero Nelson no se siente feliz de tener otra hija.

programme.title: Pasión: Tu verdadero padre
programme.desc: Francisca le dice a Lafont que Bernabé tiene la carta. Ofelia le cuenta la verdad a Santiago y él huye.

programme.title: Santo y Blue Demon en la Atlántida
programme.desc: Un científico nazi, usando la ciudad perdida de Atlantis como su base de operaciones, amenaza con destruir la civilización con una bomba nuclear. El científico nazi quiere que el Tercer Reich empiece a gobernar de nuevo y si sus demandas no se cumplen, él seguirá adelante con su amenaza de aniquilación nuclear. Con muy poco tiempo que perder, Santo es enlistado para encontrar la bomba nuclear, desarmarla y poner fin al plan diabólico del científico nazi.

programme.title: Frida, naturaleza viva
programme.desc: La historia de la reconocida pintora Frida Kahlo y sus encuentros con las personalidades de su tiempo. Los recuerdos de su infancia y el accidente que le causó un terrible dolor.

programme.title: El juicio de los hijos
programme.desc: Una viuda es acusada por su suegra delante de sus hijos de que uno de ellos es el producto de un amorío.

programme.title: Los Campeones Justicieros
programme.desc: Un grupo de luchadores se enfrenta a un científico demente que crea un artefacto que tiene la fuerza de diez atletas.

programme.title: El Charro de las calaveras
programme.desc: "El Charro" sale al rescate en estas tres historias: el lobo humano, el vampiro humano y el jinete sin cabeza.

programme.title: En Tiempos de Don Porfirio
programme.desc: Cuando un hombre pierde dinero en el juego, y olvida ir a su propia boda, su novia embarazada es enviada a Europa.

programme.title: Dinamita Kid
programme.desc: Un hombre se convierte en luchador y se hace llamar "Dinamita Kid" para enfrentar al experimentado Huracán Ramírez.

programme.title: Dos corazones y un cielo
programme.desc: El ego mutuo entre una pareja de artistas provoca rencillas y separación, pero un cómico primo tiene la solución.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Juventud sin salud, más amarga que la senectud
programme.desc: Una joven siente que su mamá no la quiere y solo se preocupa por la salud de su hermana gemela. Cuando un chico se fija en su hermana, la joven comienza a molestarla provocando que sufra un ataque, como consecuencia, la joven cambiará totalmente.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Es bueno el encaje, pero no tan ancho
programme.desc: Los abuelos de Tommy descubren, muy a su pesar, que el pequeño y su madre tienen el síndrome de Asperger.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Es mejor encender una vela que maldecir la oscuridad
programme.desc: Una mujer sufre de depresión y cree que todo en su vida está mal, por lo que su hija la lleva con Don Tomás, quien le cuenta tres historias de superación ante la enfermedad, discapacidad y falta de dinero.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Es mejor agitarse en la duda, que descansar en el error
programme.desc: Lulú tiene su primera vez con Humberto y, al ser abandonada por él, se da cuenta de que su exnovio no es el amor de su vida.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: La novedad es flor de un día, hoy ya no luce lo que ayer lucía
programme.desc: Los celos de José Luis lo están alejando de Marieta y si no hace algo por cambiar, podría perderla para siempre.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: La vaca se olvida que fue ternero
programme.desc: Una joven se niega a dejar a su novio para mudarse de la ciudad con su familia, por lo que busca a su padre biológico para quedarse a vivir con él. La vida de la joven y de su padre cambiará y ambos aprenderán a conocerse.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: La vida es dura pero madura
programme.desc: Felipe es utilizado y explotado por su madre y Azul, una bailarina que conoce en un club de strippers, con quien se obsesiona.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: La zorra nunca se ve su cola
programme.desc: Brandon y Kevin no pierden oportunidad de aprovecharse y burlarse de Brayan o de hacerlo quedar en ridículo. Además, Brandon quiere todo con Britany y la fiesta es el momento ideal para quitársela a Brayan.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Las redadas que realizan los agentes de migración han hecho que el miedo tome muchos vecindarios de Estados Unidos. Las historias de quienes han sido deportados son contadas. También, las historias de quienes viven temerosos de ser deportados.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: El temor a las deportaciones masivas aumentó después de que el Departamento de Seguridad Nacional anunciara nuevas reglas que priorizan las expulsiones de inmigrantes indocumentados.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Familias trabajadoras están pensando dos veces antes de salir a su empleo o enviar a los niños a la escuela por temor de ser sorprendidos por las autoridades en la calle o usando el transporte público.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Los mirreyes son la nueva generación de los hijos de papi. Privilegiados y desafiantes, tratan con desprecio a quienes les sirven. Los secretos de los hijos de los ricos y los poderosos son la evidencia de la guerra de clases en el México de hoy.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Fueron interrogados y pronto las preguntas se convirtieron en golpes. El drama de quienes han sufrido la tortura en carne propia y un exmilitar justifica sus acciones.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Intimidación e insultos racistas, amenazas y ataques físicos. Letreros racistas pintados en las paredes, pareciera no haber lugar seguro. Una nueva realidad se está viviendo en muchos vecindarios, familias viviendo bajo el miedo.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: De día es un estudiante universitario y de noche bailarín exótico. Para unos era su guía espiritual, para otros era un peligro para su comunidad.

programme.title: NEW KPOP
programme.desc: The Romantic Songs playlist is a collection of the sweetest and most heart-fluttering K-pop tracks. Filled with dreamy melodies, heartfelt lyrics, and charming performances, this playlist captures the essence of love in all its forms. From playful confessions to deep emotions, every song adds a romantic touch. Whether you're falling in love or reminiscing about precious memories, this playlist is the perfect soundtrack for the moment! (Track List: JOYURI - GLASSY / TWS - plot twist / POW - Boyfriend / NCT DREAM - My First and Last / TWICE - YES or YES / ILLIT - Magnetic / THE BOYZ - Bloom Bloom / woo!ah! - Rollercoaster / NCT 127 - TOUCH / OH MY GIRL - NONSTOP / ENHYPEN - Not For Sale / STAYC - STEREOTYPE / ONF - Complete / IZONE - Violeta / SEVENTEEN - Pretty U / Apink - Mr. Chu (On Stage) / Lovelyz - Ah-Choo / TWS - If I'm S, Can You Be My N? / Girls' Generation - Lion Heart / IZONE - UP / TWICE - LIKEY / DKZ - Cupid / STAYC - ASAP / GFRIEND - Me Gustas Tu / TXT - Blue Hour / DRIPPIN - Weekend / KISS OF LIFE - Sticky / Lovelyz - Candy Jelly Love / CRAVITY - Cloud 9 / The Wind - Hello, My First Love / TWICE - What is Love? / EPEX - My Girl / PENTAGON - Shine / OH MY GIRL - Real Love / MADEIN - UNO / BOYNEXTDOOR - OUR / ATEEZ - Celebrate / ENHYPEN - Paranormal / BTOB - Only one for me / N.Flying - Spring Memories / YENA - SUGAR / ZEROBASEONE - and I / Billlie - remembrance candy / N.Flying - Rooftop)

programme.title: Gil Evans & Ornette Coleman
programme.sub-title: Gil Evans, Ornette Coleman - Schloss Ansbach
programme.desc: This program presents two concerts from Schloss Ansbach in 1978. The first concert features Gil Evans and his orchestra, consisting of Gil Evans on piano, Steve Lacy on soprano saxophone, Arthur Blythe on alto saxophone, Pit Levin on synthesizers, Earl McIntyre on trombone, Lewis Soloff on trumpet, Geoffrey Berlin on bass and Sue Evans on percussion instruments. The second concert features saxophonist Ornette Coleman at the peak of his musically expressive powers. Coleman is joined by Bern Nix on guitar, Charles Ellerbee on guitar, Albert Arnold on bass, and Shannon Jackson on drums and percussion.

programme.title: Raul Midón
programme.desc: Raul Midón appeared at 2017's Sing Jazz Festival in Singapore with double bassist Romeir Mendez and drummer Billy Williams. Blind since birth, Raul Midón is a singer, guitarist, and songwriter from New Mexico. With a vocal range as dynamic as his guitar playing and a remarkable talent for trumpet mimicry, Midón's performances transcend musical boundaries, effortlessly blending rock, jazz, folk, and Latin pop into his unique sound. He has worked with numerous legends, including Bill Withers, Herbie Hancock, Sting, and Dianne Reeves, and his album ‘Bad Ass and Blind' was nominated for a Grammy Award for Best Jazz Vocal Album in 2018. No wonder the Sing Jazz audience were ecstatic!

programme.title: Mel Lewis, James Powell, William Powell & Glenn Drewes
programme.sub-title: The Mel Lewis Orchestra live at Estival Lugano
programme.desc: Since 1977, Estival is a summer jazz festival in Switzerland, Lugano. Estival offers a thrilling and particularly surprising line-up that explores the rich world of contemporary music whilst promoting the understanding of different cultures, tolerance, and co-existence. The Mel Lewis Orchestra was arguably the most influential big band since the swing era. They were an unusual band, creating new styles, succeeding in an era when big bands were unpopular and remaining integrated during racially tense periods.

programme.title: Miles Davis
programme.desc: American trumpeter Miles Davis (1926-1991) was a pioneering jazz musician from the late 1940s to the late 1980s. His influence on 20th century music is hard to overstate, as he trailblazed bebop, cool jazz, hardbop, modal jazz, and electronic music. On October 11, 1964, Miles Davis performed at Teatro Dell'Arte in Milan. With tenor saxophonist Wayne Shorter, pianist Herbie Hancock, bassist Ron Carter and drummer Tony Williams, Davis performed Autumn Leaves, My Funny Valentine, All Blues, All of You, and Joshua.

programme.title: Louis Armstrong
programme.desc: Following a highly successful small-group jazz concert at New York Town Hall on May 17, 1947, Armstrong's manager Joe Glaser dissolved the Armstrong big band on August 13, 1947 and established a six-piece small group. This group was called the All Stars, and in 1964 Louis Armstrong recorded his biggest-selling record, Hello, Dolly! He made assorted television appearances, especially in the 1950s and 1960s – the recorded film was a TV Show in Australia when Armstrong was at the peak of his career. Armstrong kept up his busy tour schedule until a few years before his death in 1971. He also toured Africa, Europe, and Asia under sponsorship of the US State Department with great success, earning the nickname ‘Ambassador Satch'.

programme.title: Kenny Barron
programme.desc: Pianist Kenny Barron's June 27, 2019 appearance at the Alfa Jazz Festival in Ukraine's Lviv was a celebration of sublime jazz virtuosity. The revered elder statesmen of jazz piano brought his regular working trio of Kiyoshi Kitagawa (bass) and Jonathan Blake (drums), augmented by stellar jazzman Marcus Strickland (tenor saxophone) and young lion Riley Mulherkar (trumpet). Their seamless blend of classic bebop and modern explorations spoke of a deep, emotive connection to each note, captivating the Ukrainian audience with lyrical improvisations during this unforgettable concert.

programme.title: Gilberto Gil
programme.desc: Brazilian artist Gilberto Gil returns to Jazz à Vienne in France with a new round of singing that is inspired by his latest album ‘Fé na Festa': a mixture of celebration, tradition and even some rock now and then. Gilberto Gil, worldwide known for as musician and the Brazilian minister of Culture, was one of the pioneers of the cultural movement ‘tropicalismo'. This movement, with a strong character of social protest, combines elements of traditional Brazilian culture with modern art forms. Gilberto Gil's new sound clearly has its roots in Brazilian culture, yet it is always inspired by jazz.

programme.title: Paul Desmond
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Chucho Valdis
programme.desc: Legendary Cuban pianist Chucho Valdés brought his band ‘Jazz Batá 2' to the Malta Jazz Festival on July 19, 2019. The air was thick with anticipation as Valdés took to the stage, revisiting the small-group concept of his mythical 1972 Cuban album ‘Jazz Batá'. The batá repertoire – the deep classical music of West Africa – permeates Valdés' piano solos throughout the concert. Valdés's band consists of Dreiser Durruthy (Batas and vocals), Yaroldy Abreu (percussions and vocals), Abraham Mansfarroll (percussion), Ramón Vazquez Martirena-Bajo (bass guitar). They delivered a performance that reverberated through the historic island.

programme.title: Manu Katché, Alfio Origlio, Walter Ricci & Jérôme Regard
programme.sub-title: Katché & Origlio Quartet feat. Walter Ricci
programme.desc: Four exceptional musicians team up to perform classic pop and soul songs made famous by the likes of Gregory Porter, Stevie Wonder, U2, Seal, and many more. Pianist Alfio Origlio signed up to do the arrangements. Walter Ricci, an accomplished jazz vocalist from Naples, eases us into his musical universe with his stunning sensitivity. He is accompanied by an exceptional rhythm section composed of Manu Katché on drums, Jérôme Regard on bass, and Alfio Origlio on piano. This concert was recorded at Festival Jazz au Sommet 2020 in France.

programme.title: Jaco Pastorius
programme.desc: The audience at the Montreal Jazz Festival in Canada was in for a treat on July 3, 1982, as a true musical innovator hit the stage: Jaco Pastorius, who transformed the electric bass into a formidable solo instrument. Combining intricate harmonics, fluid melodies, and unparalleled technical skill, Pastorius left a lasting impact on the music world. In this concert, he is accompanied by Peter Erskine (drums), Don Alias (percussion), Othello Molineaux (steel drums), Bob Mintzer (tenor sax and bass clarinet), and Randy Brecker (trumpet and electronics). They perform “Chicken”, “Donna Lee”, “Mr. Phone Bone”, and “Fannie Mae”. Don't miss this extraordinary opportunity to experience Jaco Pastorius's electrifying performance at the Montreal Jazz Festival 1982!

programme.title: James Brown
programme.sub-title: James Brown - The North Sea Jazz
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. Back in 1981, legendary American singer James Brown gave an unforgettable performance at the North Sea Jazz Festival in The Hague. The "Godfather of Soul", "Mr. Dynamite", and "Soul Brother No. 1" was a major force in 20th century popular music, influencing many musicians in numerous genres.

programme.title: Mademoiselle Karen, Jakob Munch, Danish National Symphony Orchestra & Emma Smith
programme.desc: One night only! Welcome to the spectacular and decadent world of The Babylon Hotel, where music pours out of every crevice like bubbling champagne. In this concert, the upper class meets the underworld in a melting pot of euphoria and extravagance, nostalgia and pleasure with a carefree sinfulness only seen in the exuberant nightlife of the 1920s around the world. The concert features iconic music from movies and series, such as The Great Gatsby, Burlesque, and Babylon Berlin. The music is performed by the Danish National Symphony Orchestra and DR Big Band under the direction of Miho Hazama. The concert also features the Moka Efti Orchestra, and singers Madame le Pustra, Emma Smith, Mademoiselle Karen, Jakob Munch, and Nikko Weidemann, as well as dancers of Sweet Burlesque. This performance was recorded at the DR Koncerthuset in Copenhagen, Denmark, in May 2023.

programme.title: Ludwig Wicki, Danish National Symphony Orchestra, DR Junior Choir & Andrea Lykke Oehlenschlæger
programme.desc: Swiss conductor Ludwig Wicki leads the Danish National Symphony Orchestra and the DR Junior Choir in a sparkling concert program of film music. The program features a selection of music from great and Oscar-winning Hollywood films, including Titanic, The Bodyguard, Pirates of the Caribbean, Braveheart, and Moulin Rouge, written by major composers such as John Williams, Hans Zimmer, James Horner, and Klaus Badelt. Highlights include ‘He's a pirate/Davy Jones' from Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Man's Chest ‘Now We Are Free' from Gladiator ‘My Heart Will Go On' from Titanic and ‘Shallow' from A Star Is Born. Featured soloists in this concert are the young talented singers Andrea Lykke Oehlenschlæger and Diluckshan Jeyaratnam. This performance was recorded at the DR Koncerthuset in Copenhagen, Denmark, in May 2022.

programme.title: Pavel Milyukov & Boris Berezovsky
programme.sub-title: Works for violin by Franck, Fauré, Schubert a.o.
programme.desc: Russian violinist Pavel Milyukov and pianist Boris Berezovsky join forces in this concert recorded at Tchaikovsky Concert Hall in Moscow, Russia, on October 15, 2020. Milyukov has won prizes at various international competitions and has appeared at venues throughout Europe. He forms an excellent chamber music duo with acclaimed pianist Boris Berezovsky. On this concert's program are César Franck's Sonata for violin and piano Gabriel Fauré's Après un rêve Alfred Schnittke's Stille Nacht and Franz Schubert's Erlkönig. As an encore, the duo performs ‘Russian Song' from Igor Stravinsky's opera Mavra (arranged by S. Dushkin).

programme.title: Daniel Barenboim
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Les Dissonances & David Grimal
programme.sub-title: Brahms - Symphony No. 2 in D major, Op. 73
programme.desc: Les Dissonances is a collective of artists founded by violinist David Grimal in 2004. The conductorless ensemble consists of musicians from the most prestigious European orchestras, international soloists, and young talents. In this performance, Les Dissonances present Johannes Brahms's Symphony No. 2 in D major, Op. 73. Whereas it took the composer over a decade to complete his first symphony, he penned his Symphony No. 2 in just a few months, during his summer sojourn in the restful Austrian village of Pörtschach in 1877. Nicknamed his ‘Pastoral' symphony, the work is arguably the most sunny and optimistic of Brahms's four symphonies. Lyrical in character, it features joyful melodies. This performance was recorded at Philharmonie de Paris, France, in 2015.

programme.title: Claudio Abbado & Lucerne Festival Orchestra
programme.desc: The Lucerne Festival Orchestra performs Gustav Mahler's Symphony No. 5 under the direction of Claudio Abbado. This unique orchestra was formed as part of the annual festival in Lucerne, Switzerland.

programme.title: Music from sci-fi films
programme.desc: Travel to unknown realms with epic scores from cinema's most thrilling sci-fi films.

programme.title: Music from real-life stories
programme.desc: Delve into powerful stories of real-life icons and the unforgettable scores they inspired.

programme.title: Music from cinematic scores
programme.desc: Enjoy stirring renditions of riveting movie scores performed by leading classical artists.

programme.title: Music from silver screen classics
programme.desc: Revisit the unforgettable scores that defined the golden age of 20th-century cinema.

programme.title: Music from feel-good comedies
programme.desc: Enjoy an infectious mix of musical scores from the most memorable comedic moments on film.

programme.title: Music from family film classics
programme.desc: Flight, fancy, and a spoonful of sugar: this collection will awaken the child in us all.

programme.title: Music from love stories
programme.desc: Step into the world of romance with the most heart-stirring film scores ever composed.

programme.title: Lynyrd Skynyrd
programme.desc: The quintessential Southern rock band, Lynyrd Skynyrd rose to prominence in 1973, full of regional pride and stressing cocky, boisterous hard rock as opposed to the Allman Brothers' more open-ended blues. Their signature song, "Freebird," complete with it fiery five-minute, three-guitar solo, is easily the most requested live song in existence. When the band broke up in 1977, after Ronnie Van Zant, Steve Gaines and Cassie Gaines died in a plane crash, rock suffered a tremendous loss.

programme.title: Johnny Cash
programme.desc: A documentary that sweeps you along with the flow of musical genius that is Johnny Cash. From his family's poverty in the Great Depression to touring with Elvis and becoming a legend in his own right. We see his reinvention for a whole new generation with Rick Rubin and how ‘Hurt' became the epitaph to his amazing life and career.

programme.title: Various Artists
programme.desc: The best of Qello Concerts

programme.title: Neil Young
programme.desc: Neil Young is one of the most influential songwriters and guitarists of his generation, known for recording such favourites as 'Old Man,' 'Harvest Moon' and 'Heart of Gold.' Leading music critics cast fresh light on the career of Neil Young.

programme.title: Eric Clapton
programme.desc: Eric Clapton was born in 1945 in the town of Ripley Surrey. His father was a Canadian soldier who had been stationed in the UK but had to return to his wife in Canada as the Second World War closed. With his father missing, Clapton was brought up by his grandparents, who acted as his parents, whilst his young mother pretended to be his sister. He did not find out the truth until he was nine Clapton found solace in his unusual childhood in American 50s rock and roll that had exploded in the UK and although artists like Chuck Berry and Buddy Holly made an impact, it was blues artists like Freddie King, Buddy Guy and B B King, that would be the biggest influence on the developing guitar player. The greatest influence of all though, was the legendary Robert Johnson, who Clapton would call the most important blues singer who ever lived and to whom he would dedicate an entire album much later in his career. Clapton honed his craft playing gigs in both Richmond and the West End of London. After making a name for himself with his talents, he was asked to join the Yardbirds after the previous guitarist had left. The Yardbirds found success with their first studio album, For Your Love, but Clapton himself would leave after just two years. The band would become music legend though, due to the incredible line-up of guitarists that would follow in Clapton's footsteps. Clapton's decision to leave the Yardbirds was out of a determination not to go down a pop-oriented path and to remain committed to the blues He quickly moved on to the aptly-named John Mayall and the Bluesbreakers Clapton's time in the Bluesbreakers would last mere months though. He had befriended drummer Ginger Baker and together with bassist and singer Jack Bruce, they decided to form arguably the world's first super-group, Cream Cream became a global success and Clapton's reputation as the undisputed king of rock guitar seemed safe until a fan, going by the name of Jimi Hendrix asked if he could join Cream on stage for a jam. His performance antics and guitar skills made Clapton leave the stage, asking Jimi's manager, “Is he always this good?” Despite their musical rivalry Clapton and Hendrix became friends. There was mutual admiration between the two right up until Hendrix's untimely death. Clapton said that his death hit him hard Cream began to fall apart at the end of the 1960s and they released their aptly-titled farewell album, Goodbye His biggest hit to date would come with the cover of Bob Marley's I Shot The Sheriff, which his management convinced him to include on 461 Ocean Boulevard. The cover reached number one on the Billboard charts Clapton has continued to release new studio albums and to tour extensively. His long list of former band mates has meant he has had many people to re-join on stage. He has even performed with Jeff Beck, the man who replaced him in the Yardbirds Featuring archive material, music videos “Blue Eyes Blue” “My Father's Eyes”and, exclusive insights from music critics and journalists Michael Bonner (Uncut Magazine), Hamish MacBain (Shortlist), John Aizlewood (Evening Standard) Rock Legends Eric Clapton tells the story of one of Britain's enduring rock stars

programme.title: Various Artists
programme.desc: The best of Qello Concerts

programme.title: Eagles
programme.desc: Eagles With five number one singles, 14 Top 40 hits, and four number one albums, the Eagles were among the most successful recording artists of the 1970s. At the end of the 20th century, two of those albums -- Their Greatest Hits (1971-1975) and Hotel California -- ranked among the ten best-selling albums ever. Leading music critics cast fresh light on the career of the Eagles.

programme.title: Santana
programme.desc: Santana is an American Latin rock band formed in San Francisco, California in 1966 by Mexican-American guitarist Carlos Santana. The band first came to widespread public attention when their performance of "Soul Sacrifice" at Woodstock in 1969 provided a contrast to other acts on the bill. This exposure helped propel their first album, also named Santana, into a hit, followed in the next two years by the successful Abraxas and Santana III. Leading music critics cast fresh light on the career of Santana.

programme.title: Various Artists
programme.desc: The best of Qello Concerts

programme.title: David Bowie
programme.desc: Exploring the life and career of musician and actor David Bowie, who returned to the top of the charts in 2013 with The Next Day, his first album in a decade. Music critics and DJs offer their thoughts on the London-born artist's colourful career and enduring success.

programme.title: Elton John
programme.desc: The stratospheric career of Elton John. The ‘Rocket Man' that made the piano player a rock star, this documentary follows a journey from budding songwriter, to his 70s peak as the one of the most prolific artists of his generation, his flamboyant costumes and classic songs and closing with being one of the very few musicians who can still top the charts 45 years into their career.

programme.title: Various Artists
programme.desc: The best of Qello Concerts

programme.title: ABBA
programme.desc: Abba are one of Sweden's biggest exports and the world's biggest pop act. With sales estimated at 400 million, as a group they are second only the Beatles. However, the pop music that will be remembered for generations to come grew out of a very different sound. Abba entered the Eurovision heats. They succeeded and performed the song Waterloo in the 1974 contest. The band entered superstar status with the 1976 release of their first greatest hits. The token new song on the record was Fernando. It remains Abba's biggest-selling single to date, with sales of 10 million copies. The late 1970s was a period of unstoppable success for Abba. The 1976 album Arrival, showcased the finely-honed skill of pop song-writing and its lead single, Dancing Queen, was a prime example of that. Featuring archive material, music videos “DANCING QUEEN” “MAMA MIA ABBA” and, exclusive insights from music critics and journalists JOHN AIZLEWOOD (Evening Standard), DANIELLE PERRY (XFM), WILL HODGKINSON (The Times) & CAMILLA PIA (BBC Radio 6)

programme.title: Various Artists
programme.desc: The best of Qello Concerts

programme.title: Bee Gees
programme.desc: Journalists and critics examine the rise and success of The Bee Gees. The Bee Gees received their first record deal in 1963 with Festival Records. March 1978 saw the Bee Gees occupy the two top positions on the US charts with Night Fever and Staying Alive. Having won five Grammy awards for Saturday Night Fever, the Bee Gees were a worldwide sensation, for the first time since The Beatles.

programme.title: Britney Spears
programme.desc: Filmed at Roundhouse, London, this concert film will give all fans a spectacular Live experience from start to finish. Britney Spears performs her hits including "Baby One More Time", "Oops! I Did It Again", "Toxic" and many more.

programme.title: Above the Fiji Islands II
programme.desc: In Above the Fiji Islands 2, viewers will gracefully soar over some of the most majestic and remote islands in the South Pacific - paired with stereo real-life nature sounds and soothing signature ambient music by Relax Moods. With a dynamic mix of perspectives both from the ground level & a bird's eye view, and through the use of extra smooth & slow continuous shots, this film is sure to help anyone forget all of their worries! At the end of the film, there is a beautiful real-time sunset so viewers can enjoy watching the sun as it sinks into the sea...

programme.title: Tropical Weightlessness

programme.title: Sunny Getaways
programme.desc: Start your day off the beaten path facing an iridescent blue bay on the Dominican Republic's spectacular Playa Rincón's.

programme.title: Diamond Beach II: Indonesia
programme.desc: Often compared to the idyllic beach scenes of postcards, these shores and accompanying diamond-shaped cliffs that lend their name are sure to awe and inspire.

programme.title: Dazzling Blue Lakeshore
programme.desc: Relax for one full hour on the stunningly blue shoreline of New Zealand's famous Lake Pukaki and enjoy the mesmerizing sights of blue water illuminating, clouds, and waves. Filmed in January 2017 on New Zealand's South Island.

programme.title: Magical Mcway Cove
programme.desc: Enjoy the wondrous sights & sounds of one of the best coastal views in the world - Big Sur - in full 4K glory. Prepare your senses for a relaxation experience only Big Sur and 4K can offer.

programme.title: ARTspiration: Elegant Objects 2
programme.desc: Elegant Objects E2: Florals — A serene visual journey through delicate blooms and graceful botanical forms. Blending fine art with nature's elegance, creating a calming atmosphere perfect for any space.

programme.title: Spring Forward: Spring Impressions
programme.desc: Spring Forward: Spring Impressions E3 — Celebrate the beauty of spring through the luminous brushstrokes of Impressionism. Featuring works by contemporary artists & old masters, the art is accompanied by contemporary classical music, immersing viewers in the colors & rhythms of the season.

programme.title: Spring Rites
programme.desc: Spring: Spring Rites E1 — Celebrate spring with a unique motion artwork by Rado Rossum, capturing the season's vibrant renewal. Through dynamic visuals and fluid movement, Rossum evokes the blossoming energy of nature, inviting viewers into a refreshing, dreamlike celebration of growth and rebirth.

programme.title: Happy Hour: Fashion Edge II
programme.desc: Fashion Edge E2 — A dynamic showcase of cutting-edge pieces that redefine fashion's limits. From bold, innovative patterns to daring silhouettes, be captivated by an explosion of colors and concepts that ignite the senses.

programme.title: Happy Hour
programme.desc: Happy Hour E1 — A jubilant tribute capturing the essence of merriment and relaxation through a symphony of colors, paired with the musical genres of electro, deep house and lounge. Each piece bursts with bold, expressive designs celebrating the beauty of unwinding.

programme.title: Featured Artists
programme.desc: Diverse Perspectives: Hispanic Artists Now E3 — This art collection of real & imagined landscapes, soulful abstract work, & vivid surrealist portraits offers a colorful exploration Hispanic culture. The music includes rhythmic electro, percussive afro-beats, & soft-house with a modern Latin edge.

programme.title: Featured Artists
programme.desc: Eyes On The East E1 — Immerse yourself in a vibrant tapestry of Asian American and Pacific Islander culture, where each piece resonates with the depth and diversity of this dynamic community, and mid-tempo melodies lull and transport you to an adventure of the Far East.
